name: atlas-blob-d3-tricubic-on
description: Wave 3 Phase 6f — D3 tricubic toggle on the 12-Sphere Blob. Smooth-union geometry has minimal D3 quality benefit (already smooth) — this fixture is the sanity no-regression case for the toggle-ON state. As of Phase 6e ship, pixel-matches `atlas-blob-orbit` (toggle is inert). When the marchRay branch wiring lands, expected difference vs trilinear is small (sub-pixel-only on shadows / silhouettes) — tight tolerance catches unintended drift.
